title: Concurrent messages to stopped tenant → single start (startup lock)
evidence: All 3 TC-004 assertions passed (112/112 total e2e tests): - ✓ TC-004: tenant is ACTIVE after initial provisioning - ✓ TC-004: stop tenant via POST /v1/tenants/:id/stop → status becomes STOPPED - ✓ TC-004: two concurrent messages trigger only ONE docker start (startup lock prevents duplicate) [2227ms] - docker.start called exactly 1 time - docker.run called 0 times (new calls after initial provision) - startup_locks max row count ≤ 1 during concurrent processing - startup_locks table empty after completion (lock released) - Both Ev_TC004_MSG1 and Ev_TC004_MSG2 DELIVERED
